quality_cases.prompt: Reply with exactly this single word and no punctuation: PARETOPILOT
Reply with only the uppercase word BLUE.
Reply with exactly these two words and nothing else: ARM READY
Reply with only this identifier: A64-2026
Extract the ticket identifier and reply with only it. Text: The deployment review for PP-104 begins tomorrow.
Extract the owner's full name and reply with only it. Text: Service: inference-api; Owner: Maya Chen; Region: central.
Extract the retry count and reply with only the integer. Text: workers=4, retries=37, timeout=90.
Extract the deadline and reply with only the ISO date. Text: Draft due 2026-08-10; final deadline 2026-08-14.
Classify the sentiment as POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, or NEUTRAL. Reply with only the label. Text: The optimized server is faster and uses less memory.
Classify this issue as PERFORMANCE, SECURITY, or DOCUMENTATION. Reply with only the label. Text: An unauthenticated endpoint exposes private records.
Classify 57 as ODD or EVEN. Reply with only the label.
Classify a dolphin as MAMMAL, BIRD, or FISH. Reply with only the label.
Reply with only the integer result of 17 plus 25.
Reply with only the integer result of 9 multiplied by 7.
Reply with only the integer result of 144 divided by 12.
Reply with only the integer that is 15 percent of 200.
Reply with exactly this one-line JSON object and no code fence: {"status":"ready"}
Reply with exactly this one-line JSON object and no code fence: {"arm64":true,"workers":4}
Reply with exactly this one-line JSON array and no code fence: ["red","blue"]
Reply with exactly this one-line JSON object and no code fence: {"result":42,"unit":"ms"}
Reply with only the city name: What is the capital of Japan?
At standard pressure, at what Celsius temperature does water freeze? Reply with only the integer.
Reply with only the planet name: What is the largest planet in the Solar System?
Reply with only the chemical symbol for gold.

performance.prompt: ParetoPilot evaluates several inference configurations on one controlled Arm64 host. It records raw samples, validates provenance, applies a declared quality floor and resource ceilings, computes the non-dominated candidates, and explains why a configuration should or should not be deployed. Summarize the value of transparent, reproducible optimization evidence for an engineering team.
